arts.ttl: 33-goal striker known for his role in Liverpool’s Champions League win vs Barcelona linked with move to Leeds – report
arts.sum: Leeds United continue to look to bolster their squad in the January transfer window as they maintain their strong position at the top of the Championship. The latest move sees the club take Liverpool academy forward Oakley Cannonier on trial at their Thorp Arch training ground, according to a report from The Athletic. arts.ttl: Chiesa Pledges Future to Liverpool: “I Want to Be Here”
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa has made his intentions clear, squashing rumors of a potential move away from Liverpool. The Italian winger's commitment comes amid speculation linking him with a return to Serie A, particularly with Napoli showing interest following Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's departure to Paris Saint-Germain. The post Chiesa Pledges Future to Liverpool: “I Want to Be Here” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Liverpool seal £84m windfall thanks to FSG bargaining behind the scenes
Race discrimination claim against Liverpool thrown out by tribunal
arts.athr: Hannah Al-Othman, North of England correspondent
arts.sum: Asad Farooq unsuccessfully applied for first-team support role Club argues ‘no evidence that race played any part’ A man who had claimed that Liverpool Football Club had unlawfully discriminated against him because of his race has had his claim thrown out by an employment tribunal. Asad Farooq had applied for a job as a first-team operations officer in November 2022. The “high-pressure” role involved supporting the team in their day-to-day activities. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Saudi Arabia’s sports minister keen for Mohamed Salah to join Pro League
arts.sum: Saudi debating whether 2034 World Cup will be in winter ‘To have Mo Salah would be a pleasure and a privilege’ Saudi Arabia’s sports minister says he would love to have Mohamed Salah playing in his country’s top flight, and revealed a winter World Cup in 2034 is “a debate that we’re still having with Fifa”. Salah has been in sensational form for Liverpool this season but is out of contract in the summer, with speculation persisting that the Saudi Pro League could be a possible destination for the Egyptian. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent major Arsenal title race warning which should concern Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool are in a strong position to win the Premier League title but Arsenal have hinted that they still believe in finishing above Arne Slot's team

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank blown away by Liverpool man as behind-the-scenes footage from Brentford emerges
arts.sum: Thomas Frank was discussing Liverpool's 2-0 win over Brentford in their match analysis

arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven boss Peter Bosz SLAMS his own players for 'disrespecting' Liverpool during their 3-2 Champions League win
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven manager Peter Bosz gave a scathing public rebuke to his players for their 'disrespectful' actions against Liverpool .
